alert.title: Are you sure?
alert.message: You are going to remove the record {{ name }} and all of the info related from the device.

empty.title: No records
empty.info: You don't have any records yet. Create one to start using the app.

error.title: Error
error.info: There was an error loading the records. Please try again later.

success.info: Remote status successfully checked from: {{ serverUrl }}

sending.title: Sending Records
sending.info: Please wait while we send the records to the server.

done.title: Sending Successful!
done.info: The records have been successfully sent to the server.

all_records_sent: All records already sent to the server
